title: Legal entity/Individual: Fimarge, Societat Financera d’Inversió, SA
text:
Status: Unappealable

Penalty imposed on Fimarge, Societat Financera d’Inversió, SA in the amount of 12,000 euros (following the application of a 40% reduction to the initially proposed penalty of 20,000 euros , in accordance with Article 8.3 of Law on the disciplinary regime of the financial system of 27 November 1997 ( LRRD )). The penalty is set out in Article 18.2 of LRRD and results from the commission of two serious infringements , classified under Article 16 n) and w) of the same regulation, due to non-compliance with the regulations relating to investor protection and the absence or non-application of measures or policies for managing conflicts of interest, in accordance with the provisions of Law 7/2024, of 27 May, on the organisation and functioning of entities operating in the financial system and market abuse.
